title: Smoothly Optimized
description:
Original name is Godnxss Optimized.
Minecraft optimization modpack that uses public optimization mods. Made for those who don’t want to spend HOURS maxing their FPS.
body:
![decent fps boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50cf168b4363f3712d8a674943dcf865366bf083.png)# About

**This modpack focuses purely on performance and stability.**
It combines a set of publicly available optimization mods to make Minecraft run smoother and faster, without changing gameplay or visuals in any significant way.

The goal is to help players who don’t want to spend **HOURS** researching and configuring performance mods. Just install the pack, and you’re ready to play with improved FPS and reduced stutter.

# Features

Uses only **well-tested**, public optimization mods

No gameplay or content changes, **vanilla experience** preserved

Pre-configured for **better performance** out of the box

# Notes

This modpack doesn’t include any custom mods or experimental tweaks.
All included mods are maintained by their original developers, and this pack simply organizes and configures them for convenience and accessibility.
